task.objective: Update all documentation to reflect new filter behavior and chart changes

change.add: - **Smart Filter Behavior** - When branch/suite selected: - Default: Shows last run only for that filter - Historic Summary checkbox: Shows all runs for filter - No filter: Shows all runs (aggregate) - **Chart Data Consistency** - Donut shows passed/failed only, flaky as separate badge

change.description: Update MCP tools section if needed
change.action: Add lastRunOnly param to tool descriptions

change.description: Add lastRunOnly parameter to tools table

change.add:
### Filter Behavior
When using tools with filters: - `lastRunOnly: true` - Returns metrics from most recent execution matching filter - `lastRunOnly: false` (default) - Returns aggregated metrics across all executions
Example: ```json { "tool": "get_reliability_score", "args": { "branch": "main", "lastRunOnly": true } } ```

## Smart Filter Behavior
The dashboard now provides intelligent data scoping based on filter selection:
| Filter State | Data Shown | |-------------|------------| | No filter | All runs (historical aggregate) | | Branch/Suite selected | Last run only for that filter | | Filter + "Historic Summary" | All runs for that filter |
## Chart Consistency
All charts now properly represent data categories:
- **Donut Chart**: Shows only mutually exclusive categories (Passed/Failed/Skipped) - **Flaky Indicator**: Displayed as separate badge below chart - **Summary Bar**: Shows Passed/Failed segments only

change.description: Update MCP tool definitions to include lastRunOnly
change.action: Add to relevant tools: { name: "lastRunOnly", type: "boolean", description: "When true, return metrics from most recent execution only", required: false }

testing.test: All documentation is accurate and up-to-date
MCP tools return correct data with lastRunOnly=true
Visual verification of all dashboard pages

final_verification.check: Main dashboard donut shows passed/failed only
Flaky badge appears below donut chart
Summary bar excludes flaky from segments
Historic checkbox appears when filter applied
Data changes correctly based on filter state
MCP tools work with new parameters

mandatory_final_step.action: Update status.md with feature completion: - Date: Get from system - Phase: 05_documentation - Status: completed - Mark feature as COMPLETE

mandatory_commit_step.commit_format: feat(overall-reliability-performance-improvements): phase-05 - Update documentation and verify MCP compatibility
